data.title: Economists warn: Trump's actions will undermine the credibility of US statistics
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Economists warn that the Trump administration's move to drastically cut federal staff and research funding could undermine the quality and credibility of the U.S.'s "gold standard" statistics. From employment reports to inflation indexes, U.S. data can shake Wall Street's $105 trillion stock and bond markets in milliseconds and is the basis for policies that affect the trajectory of the world's largest economy. Ricardo Reis, a professor at the London School of Economics and an adviser to the Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond, said: "All federal funding cuts, and some layoffs driven by the Department of Government Efficiency... are often a fatal blow to already tight survey work." He added: "The survey work behind data such as the consumer price index, gross domestic product - I think all of these surveys may be affected." (Jin Shi)

data.title: Critical Vulnerability in ReachMe Addressed Promptly
data.description: According to Foresight News, cybersecurity firm SlowMist has identified a significant vulnerability in the ReachMe platform. The issue was promptly communicated to the ReachMe team, and both parties collaborated to resolve the problem efficiently.

data.title: South Korea Blocks 17 Unregistered Exchange Apps
data.description:
South Korea blocks 17 unregistered crypto exchange apps to strengthen regulation and prevent money laundering.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/south-korea-blocks-17-unregistered-exchange-apps/

data.title: KiloEx TGE event has exceeded the fundraising by nearly 300 times
data.description: According to the official page of Odaily Planet Daily, the token generation event (TGE) conducted by KiloEx in cooperation with PancakeSwap through Binance Wallet has currently received 352,237 BNB subscriptions, equivalent to approximately US$224 million, which is 297.6 times higher than the planned US$750,000.

data.title: Cosmos Developers Advance Ethereum Integration via IBC Upgrade
data.description:
TL;DR IBC Evolution: Cosmos developers unveiled the “Eureka” IBC upgrade (IBC-go v10) that paves the way for native Ethereum interoperability, enabling seamless asset and data transfers. Milestone Test: Interchain Labs successfully tested an IBC transaction from Cosmos Hub to Ethereum, marking a crucial step toward robust cross-chain functionality. Collaborative Vision: This move invites further collaboration.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/cosmos-developers-advance-ethereum-integration-via-ibc-upgrade/

data.title: Trump Orders Full Digital Overhaul of Federal Payments by September
data.description:
President Trump has signed an executive order mandating that all U. S. federal payments through the General Fund transition to digital methods by Sept. 30, 2025.

The post Trump Orders Full Digital Overhaul of Federal Payments by September first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/27/trump-unleashes-digital-revolution/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=trump-unleashes-digital-revolution

data.title: GameStop Issues $1.3B Notes for Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description:
GameStop plans $1. 3 billion note issuance to acquire Bitcoin, impacting market and strategy.
source: https://coincu.com/328836-gamestop-notes-for-bitcoin

data.title: What to expect while the DeFi Broker Rule repeal awaits Trump’s signature
data.description:
U. S. lawmakers voted 292-132 to repeal the DeFi Broker Rule, awaiting Trump’s signature for approval.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/what-to-expect-while-the-defi-broker-rule-repeal-awaits-trumps-signature/

data.title: AI filters possibly made NFT collections obsolete
data.description:
The ability to render old memes and images in multiple new cartoon styles may affect the NFT market. Artists now face competition from AI, capable of extending any NFT collection, or remastering a collection in a new style.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ai-filters-made-nft-collections-obsolete/

data.title: Bitget has launched WAL spot and contract trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget has launched WAL spot and contract transactions, with a leverage range of 1-20 times. Contract trading BOT will be synchronized.
